skills.name: Promo code summary
skills.description: Summarize orders that used a given promo code over the last 30 days.

skills.name: Monthly close report
skills.description: Generate a one-page financial summary for the most recently completed calendar month.

skills.name: Top customers by lifetime value
skills.description: Rank customers by lifetime order revenue. Useful for VIP outreach.

skills.name: Scrape a URL into the active theme
skills.description: Fetch a page, extract its layout and copy, scaffold a matching Fluid theme section.

skills.name: Theme accessibility audit
skills.description: Scan the active theme for common a11y issues and propose fixes.

skills.name: Optimize theme images
skills.description: Add responsive, lazy-loaded markup with ImageKit transformation params to Fluid Liquid themes.

skills.name: Theme review & fix
skills.description: Iteratively review and fix a Fluid theme one section at a time: schema, Liquid correctness, performance, a11y, and DRY.

skills.name: Translate theme languages
skills.description: Translate a Fluid theme into every language the company has enabled, syncing locales/*.json with professional, on-brand localization.

skills.name: Scaffold a new Droplet for a Mist
skills.description: Set up the Droplet UI scaffolding (page, route, schema) for a fresh Mist app.

skills.name: Audit env vars across all live Mists
skills.description: Check every live Mist for missing or inconsistent env vars (Stripe keys, webhook secrets, etc.).

skills.name: Debug a failed Mist deploy
skills.description: Pull deployment logs, identify the failure, and propose a fix.

skills.name: Theme Clone
skills.description: Clone any website into a pixel-perfect Fluid theme — scrape the source, build sections, push, and visually verify against the original.

skills.name: Theme Refine
skills.description: Refine a Fluid theme to the gold standard: pixel-perfect visual QA after a clone, or migrate a legacy theme to the canonical architecture.

skills.name: Onboarding Pre-Fill
skills.description: Pre-fill the Fluid payments onboarding (KYC) form by scraping the company website and researching public records, with confidence scoring before pushing.
